usage: Optional Replicate image/video targets for the dashboard anthology. The dashboards render polished CSS/video fallbacks when these files are absent.

targets.prompt: Futuristic editorial situation room evidence board, source cards, timeline fragments, generated visual proof frames, high contrast, cinematic but readable, no text, no logos
Abstract geopolitical intelligence map texture with risk corridors, source-confidence markers, satellite scan traces, luminous green and cyan accents, no labels, no borders
Nanoscale biotech command surface texture, protein folding ribbons, CRISPR guide marks, glowing lab graph nodes, clean sci-fi interface material, no readable text
Deep space observatory texture, pulsar timing rings, exoplanet transit traces, long-baseline star catalog, dark cinematic astronomy dashboard material, no text
Measured OSINT satellite coverage texture for a regional infrastructure dashboard, orbital sweep arcs, route corridors, calm analytical tone, no flags, no readable labels
Futuristic social market collage texture, bonding curve energy, meme culture signals, liquidity heat, neon magenta and yellow, analytical not cartoonish, no text
Quantum probability dashboard texture, superposition fields, translucent state orbs, market belief curves, violet cyan gold, ultra-clean futuristic data surface, no text
Abyssal ocean sensor network texture, hydrothermal vent plumes, pressure waves, bioluminescent traces, deep cyan and electric teal, scientific dashboard background, no text
Anomalous astronomy watch texture, dark star catalog, stellar dimming traces, silence window, long-baseline signal grid, quiet ominous sci-fi, no text
